footer.discordInvite: Join our Discord and hang out with us!

home.heroTitle: Fun Stream Overlay Games for Twitch
home.heroSubtitle: Free, interactive, and loved by streamers worldwide

games.title: Games & Overlays
games.subtitle: Free Twitch chat-integrated games and overlays. Add them to OBS as browser sources.
games.step1Desc: Connect your Twitch account to get started
games.step2Desc: Choose from our collection of stream games
games.step3Desc: Copy the URL and add as a Browser Source in OBS
games.step4Desc: Your viewers play by typing commands in chat
games.premiumTheme: This premium theme requires an add-on.
games.loginToCheckPremium: Log in to check if you own this premium theme.

market.title: Marketplace
market.subtitle: Browse characters, pets, outfits, and more for your PixelPlush games.
market.loginToBuy: Log in with Twitch to buy items
market.notEnoughCoins: Not enough coins! Visit the coin shop above to get more.
market.purchaseTimeout: Transaction timed out. Contact support if charged.

customize.title: Dressing Room
customize.subtitle: Log in with Twitch to customize your character, equip outfits, and manage your pet.
customize.loginRequired: Log in with Twitch to customize your character

scores.title: Leaderboard
scores.subtitle: View high scores for Parachute Drop across all channels.
scores.enterChannel: Enter a channel name to view scores
scores.noScores: No scores found for this channel and time range

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Your purchase and redemption history.
transactions.loginPrompt: Log in to view your transaction history.

redeem.title: Redeem Code
redeem.subtitle: Log in to redeem a PixelPlush code.
redeem.pageSubtitle: Enter a PixelPlush code to redeem coins, items, or other rewards.
redeem.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Log Into PixelPlush
login.subtitle: Sign in with your Twitch account to customize your games, buy items, and track your scores.

troubleshoot.title: Troubleshoot
troubleshoot.subtitle: Having issues with your PixelPlush game? Use the tools below to diagnose problems.
troubleshoot.checkUrlDesc: Paste the browser source URL from OBS to check for common issues.
troubleshoot.urlPlaceholder: Paste your OBS browser source URL here...
troubleshoot.commonIssuesDesc: Click an issue to see troubleshooting tips.
troubleshoot.generateReportDesc: Copy a summary of your diagnostics to share with us on Discord.
troubleshoot.stillStuck: Still stuck? Join our Discord or email us at support@pixelplush.dev

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: PixelPlush administration tools
admin.adminOnly: This page is only available to PixelPlush administrators.
